missions.title: Missions
missions.subtitle: Choose a life category and complete focused weekly missions.

empty.title: Select a category to start
empty.description: Pick one category above to load your mission cards.

content.guideSuffix: when you are ready, then press and hold the glowing orb to log your win.

hints.pendingSuffix: then hold the orb when you finish the action.
hints.active: Keep momentum, press and hold the orb until it blooms to log your win.
hints.completed: Beautiful! Banked into your vault. Stretch missions await if you want extra shine.

emptyState.noDataDescription: This category does not have missions from the backend yet. Please check back shortly.
emptyState.noPendingTitle: Everything in this tab is done
emptyState.noPendingDescription: You have no pending missions right now. Switch to Completed to review your wins.
emptyState.noCompletedDescription: Complete one mission first, then it will appear in the Completed tab.

states.notStarted: Start with {{mission}} to build momentum this week.
states.completed: You completed this week. Review your wins and prepare your next {{category}} quest.

fallback.summary: Small, steady actions create the strongest momentum over time.
fallback.improvementFocus: Choose one clear action you can finish this week.
fallback.microHabit: Take two focused minutes today to get started.

social.summary: Meaningful connection grows when you create small moments of presence.
social.improvementFocus: Prioritize one conversation or act of kindness this week.
social.microHabit: Send one thoughtful message before the day ends.

health.summary: Your energy improves when movement, rest, and nourishment work together.
health.improvementFocus: Pick one health habit that feels supportive, not extreme.
health.microHabit: Take a ten-minute walk or drink a full glass of water right now.

selfCare.summary: Recovery is more sustainable when you protect time for yourself on purpose.
selfCare.improvementFocus: Set one boundary that gives you more room to recharge.
selfCare.microHabit: Pause for three slow breaths before your next task.

money.summary: Financial calm comes from consistent check-ins, not occasional big efforts.
money.improvementFocus: Improve visibility into one spending or saving decision this week.
money.microHabit: Review one recent transaction and label it with intent.

family.summary: Family trust grows through repeatable moments of care and attention.
family.improvementFocus: Create one shared ritual or check-in you can repeat.
family.microHabit: Reach out to one family member with a specific question today.

spirituality.summary: Inner alignment deepens when you make room for reflection and gratitude.
spirituality.improvementFocus: Choose one grounding practice that helps you slow down.
spirituality.microHabit: Spend two quiet minutes noticing your breath or writing gratitude.

relationship.summary: Stronger relationships are built through clarity, warmth, and repair.
relationship.improvementFocus: Focus on one moment of appreciation or honest communication this week.
relationship.microHabit: Say one sincere thank you or appreciation out loud today.

career.summary: Career progress compounds when you finish visible, meaningful work regularly.
career.improvementFocus: Move one priority forward in a way other people can notice.
career.microHabit: Block fifteen minutes to complete the smallest next step.
